title: rhododendron × psammogenes
intro: Rhododendron × psammogenes, also known as the hybrid rhododendron, is a cross between the western rhododendron (Rhododendron occidentale) and the western azalea (Rhododendron occidentale var. californicum). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron × psammogenes include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues. Rhododendron × psammogenes is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
